Part.Source:
For Each Order EmpCod, NfsCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where NfsCod = &NfsCod
NfsTipNF = &WizardData.Capa.NfsTipNF //Modelo Nota Novo.
NfsFilCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsFilCod NfsIntIs = &WizardData.Capa.NfsIntIs NfsIntCliCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsIntCliCod NfsIntRaz = &WizardData.Capa.NfsIntRaz NfsIntFonNum = &WizardData.Capa.NfsIntFonNum NfsIntCNPJ = &WizardData.Capa.NfsIntCNPJ NfsIntCidCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsIntCidCod NfsIntEml = &WizardData.Capa.NfsIntEml NfsCliCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCod NfsCliRaz = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliRaz NfsCliFonNum = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliFonNum NfsCliTipPes = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliTipPes NfsCliCep = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCep NfsCliLog = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliLog NfsCliNro = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliNro NfsCliBai = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliBai
//NfsCliCidCodNom = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCidCodNom
NfsCliCidCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCidCod NfsCliCidIbge = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCidIbge NfsCliCidNom = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCidNom
NfsCliCidUfCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCidUfCod NfsCliCpl = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCpl NfsCliEml = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliEml NfsCliCnpj = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCnpj NfsCliInsEst = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliInsEst NfsCliInsMun = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliInsMun NfsCliCPF = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCPF
NfsDtaEms = &WizardData.Capa.NfsDtaEms NfsDtaFat = &WizardData.Capa.NfsDtaEms NfsProTer = &WizardData.Capa.NfsProTer if &WizardData.Capa.NfsProTer = Nota_proPriaTerceira.PROPRIA NfsEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida Else NfsEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada Endif
NfsNum = &WizardData.Capa.NfsNum //NfsNumRps NfsSer = &WizardData.Capa.NfsSer
NfsPedCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsPedCod NfsPedFilCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsPedFilCod
if NfsSts.IsEmpty() or NfsSts.IsNull() NfsSts = Status_Nfe.Digitando Endif
NfsLctCod = &WizardData.Capa.nfsLctCod NfsPrsCidCod = &WizardData.Capa.nfsPrsCidCod NfsTipEmi = &WizardData.Capa.NfsTipEmi
Exit When none ultimoCodigoEmpresa.Call(domParCod.NOTAFISCALSERVICO, &EmpCod, 0, &NfsCod) &WizardData.Capa.NfsCod = &NfsCod
NEw EmpCod = &EmpCod NfsCod = &NfsCod NfsIsEnv = false NfsTipNF = &WizardData.Capa.NfsTipNF //Modelo Nota Novo. NfsFilCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsFilCod NfsIntIs = &WizardData.Capa.NfsIntIs NfsIntCliCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsIntCliCod NfsIntRaz = &WizardData.Capa.NfsIntRaz NfsIntFonNum = &WizardData.Capa.NfsIntFonNum NfsIntCNPJ = &WizardData.Capa.NfsIntCNPJ NfsIntCidCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsIntCidCod NfsIntEml = &WizardData.Capa.NfsIntEml NfsCliCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCod NfsCliRaz = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliRaz NfsCliFonNum = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliFonNum NfsCliTipPes = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliTipPes NfsCliCep = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCep NfsCliLog = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliLog NfsCliNro = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliNro NfsCliBai = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliBai
//NfsCliCidCodNom = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCidCodNom
NfsCliCidCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCidCod NfsCliCidIbge = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCidIbge NfsCliCidNom = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCidNom
NfsCliCidUfCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCidUfCod NfsCliCpl = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCpl NfsCliEml = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliEml NfsCliCnpj = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCnpj NfsCliInsEst = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliInsEst NfsCliInsMun = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliInsMun NfsCliCPF = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCPF
NfsDtaEms = &WizardData.Capa.NfsDtaEms NfsProTer = &WizardData.Capa.NfsProTer if &WizardData.Capa.NfsProTer = Nota_proPriaTerceira.PROPRIA NfsEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida Else NfsEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada Endif
NfsNum = &WizardData.Capa.NfsNum //NfsNumRps NfsSer = &WizardData.Capa.NfsSer NfsPedCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsPedCod NfsPedFilCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsPedFilCod NfsSts = Status_Nfe.Digitando
NfsLctCod = &WizardData.Capa.nfsLctCod NfsPrsCidCod = &WizardData.Capa.nfsPrsCidCod NfsTipEmi = &WizardData.Capa.NfsTipEmi EndNEw
EndFor
Commit
